title: Middle Eastern Stir Fry
description: A flavorful Middle Eastern inspired stir fry with caramel glazed chicken, served over a bed of fragrant floral herbs.

ingredients.name: Floral herbs
ingredients.notes: Chopped fresh herbs such as parsley or cilantro

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the floral herbs, Middle Eastern spice blend, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the caramel, soy sauce, and any accumulated juices.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over a bed of floral herbs.
Garnish with additional floral herbs, if desired.
